description_long: This dirt bike features a lightweight frame with a prominent red and gray color scheme, designed for off-road agility and performance. The bike is equipped with knobby tires for enhanced traction on rough terrain, and both wheels are supported by visible spoked rims. The front and rear fenders are extended to protect against mud and debris, while the seat is narrow and streamlined for easy maneuverability. The exhaust system is mounted high on the right side, typical of dirt bikes to avoid ground contact. The handlebars are wide and straight, providing optimal control for the rider in urban or rugged environments.
description: A red and gray dirt bike with knobby tires, spoked wheels, and a high-mounted exhaust, built for off-road and urban agility.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the high-mounted exhaust, spoked wheels, and extended fenders.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow handlebars, front fender, and the slim profile of the bike.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the engine, frame, and the continuation of the red and gray color scheme.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the rear tire tread, seat, and the alignment of the rear fender.
